description: Interact with QuickBooks Online directly. Query ledger items, sync transactions locally, and run advanced reconciliation triage.

novel_features.name: Changed entities check
novel_features.description: Show ledger entities modified since a duration or timestamp, using SQLite index searching.

novel_features.name: Double-billing expense audit
novel_features.description: Find duplicate purchases or bills to prevent double-billing by auditing vendor and amount proximity.

novel_features.name: Bank transaction reconciliation
novel_features.description: Find ledger candidates matching a bank transaction for reconciliation, optimized to avoid N+1 scans.

novel_features.name: Net worth calculator
novel_features.description: Calculate net worth from asset and liability accounts using offline SQLite mirrors.
